visible_evidence: Figure 3 remains on page 8 and keeps the original MDL, ConvertAsset, and NVIDIA columns aligned.
Each row now has a larger target/effect label above the render triplet rather than tiny footer microcopy.
The source and PDF-rendered Figure 3 show no obvious red fallback material signal.
Figure 3 caption, Discussion text, and Conclusion text do not overlap after the layout change.
remaining_caveats: The panel remains selected qualitative evidence and cannot support a population-level NVIDIA failure-rate claim.
Some NVIDIA baseline cells are visually low-contrast because that is the recorded render evidence, not a layout artifact.

claim_boundary.may_support: bounded selected visual inspection for the covered material-effect bins
